headline: Strategic angle — First-mover advantage in proactive ESG disclosure and governance upgrades
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, ESRS frameworks triggered; no immediate penalty but increased scrutiny.
Adani Power faces a moderate ESG score gap versus group peers, increasing peer pressure and risk of index exclusion.
Potential minor impact on talent attraction and customer trust if ESG narrative lags, but not material at present.
